problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins may resolve What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
